security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8765 ws://127.0.0.1:8765; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.longDescription: Native window for the local Maverick dashboard: launches `maverick dashboard` if it is not already running and embeds http://127.0.0.1:8765.
